prompt_text:
### Demographics: 61-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 1 (90+); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 5 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 72.1 kg; Height 169.8 cm; BMI 25.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 122/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.7%; 6 months ago 6.6%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 145mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 75.2kg; 9 months ago 72.1kg; 6 months ago 72.9kg; 3 months ago 73.2kg; current 72.1kg), Height (12 months ago 169.8cm; 9 months ago 169.8cm; 6 months ago 169.8cm; 3 months ago 169.8cm; current 169.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 25.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 122mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 11U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 9.0U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 14U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 96mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; current 96mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 92mg/g; 9 months ago 118mg/g; 6 months ago 84mg/g; 3 months ago 86mg/g; current 95mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 73mg/dL; 3 months ago 73mg/dL; current 75mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 120mg/dL; 9 months ago 132mg/dL; 6 months ago 134mg/dL; 3 months ago 134mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
